SUBJECT: Internet Marketing Armageddon

convertlinks

OK, there is something big on the horizon.
It's almost like Internet marketing
Armageddon, but then again it's sort of like
Internet marketing Nirvana.

I know that sounds weird, but let's just say
it's a double-edged sword... and it's one of
the biggest swords you've ever seen.

Now I know that might sound a like I'm being
a little overly dramatic. But this is deadly
serious stuff - we are talking about future
(and the possible failure) of your business.

If you've been reading my stuff for very
long, then you know that I don't go around
talking about the "death of this" and the "death
of that."

And I'm not about to get all "doom and
gloom" on you... there's lots of good news
here, in fact there is GREAT news. The
playing field is about to get a lot more
level, and it's going to be a lot easier to
compete with the big boys and girls. But I'm
getting ahead of myself...

In a few days you will see exactly what I
mean - we're going to be releasing at least
one more video in our Going Natural 2.0
series, and it's going to be about this
Armegeddon/Nirvana.

That video is only days away. We don't have
an exact release date, but it will be
sometime in the next week... our target date
is January 3rd.

In the meantime, if you haven't already
downloaded your copy of Stomper Scrutinizer,
go do it now. When we release that next video
you will see why this is such a crucial tool.
Here's the link:

http://about.stompernet.com/scrutinizer


best regards,
Andy Jenkins
